title: Warnings and diagnostics deterministic evidence bank

publication.changeSummary: Language-specific deterministic MCQ and fill-gap evidence for Warnings and diagnostics; human review required.

examEligibility.rationale: AI-assisted deterministic draft awaiting independent human standards and assessment review.

privateAuthorNotes: A human reviewer must verify language-version accuracy, distractor validity, equivalence, and grading evidence before formal use.
items.title: Warnings and diagnostics: reject the invalid rule
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this CPP misconception? The longest template diagnostic line is necessarily the root cause and all later notes describe separate defects.
hints: Compare each option with the exact language rule, standard boundary, and observable evidence in the authored draft.

feedback.correct: Correct. Locate the primary failed requirement or call, use candidate notes as context, minimize the example, and treat clean diagnostics as bounded evidence.
feedback.incorrect: That option preserves the documented misconception. Locate the primary failed requirement or call, use candidate notes as context, minimize the example, and treat clean diagnostics as bounded evidence.

criteria.description: Selects the source-aligned CPP correction instead of the documented misconception.

options.text: Locate the primary failed requirement or call, use candidate notes as context, minimize the example, and treat clean diagnostics as bounded evidence.
The longest template diagnostic line is necessarily the root cause and all later notes describe separate defects.

answer.explanation: Locate the primary failed requirement or call, use candidate notes as context, minimize the example, and treat clean diagnostics as bounded evidence.

examEligibility.rationale: AI-assisted deterministic draft awaiting independent human standards and assessment review.

privateAuthorNotes: A human reviewer must verify language-version accuracy, distractor validity, equivalence, and grading evidence before formal use.
items.title: Warnings and diagnostics: complete the language rule
items.prompt: Complete the missing CPP checkpoint in the source-aligned correction. Use the exact token or phrase required by this draft.
hints: Use the checkpoint that distinguishes the valid rule from this misconception: The longest template diagnostic line is necessarily the root cause and all later notes describe separate defects.

feedback.correct: Correct. The required checkpoint is 'failed requirement'.
feedback.incorrect: Recheck the exact language rule and its boundary. Locate the primary failed requirement or call, use candidate notes as context, minimize the example, and treat clean diagnostics as bounded evidence.

criteria.description: Supplies the exact CPP token or phrase that completes the reviewed rule candidate.

items.template: Locate the primary {{key-rule}} or call, use candidate notes as context, minimize the example, and treat clean diagnostics as bounded evidence.

answer.explanation: Locate the primary failed requirement or call, use candidate notes as context, minimize the example, and treat clean diagnostics as bounded evidence.
